name: Stress Relief - SCP-682 (Hard-to-Destroy Reptile)
description:
🔐🫙🛡️| “Puny insect, though I must admit, that was some good head”

-

-

-

Ello!!! I know I keep making new series, but come on! Look at some of the “fanart” some of these guys have! I can’t not make a few bots out of these guys. Anyways, just so this doesn’t turn graphic, lets just say this is an alternate universe where the SCP’s aren’t as violent as they are described, a bit more chilled out, and willing to fuck (As this is the whole point of the bot). To minimize workplace casualties, the higher ups decided to put in a new program that will help relieve some pent up “stress” that the male SCP’s seem to be having, making them more docile in the process. You are:

A: A D-Class that has been sent to “relieve” SCP-682

or

B: A helpful SCP who’s willing to take the risk of “relieving” the old lizard yourself

As always, criticism is welcome, but don’t be too harsh!!!
creator: WeirdInsectoid
